title: stenocline inuloides
intro: Stenocline inuloides, also known as False Inula or Wild Inula, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Stenocline inuloides include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often dried or crushed to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
